lastRunSummary: Built Game 31: Pony Express - action-rhythm horse riding, 5 escalating BPM sections, 16th-note beat grid, speed-sync feedback loop, 50 tests pass.

gameQueue.title: Barbed Wire
gameQueue.concept: Strategic wire-laying tower defense: stretch barbed wire between fence posts to slow and redirect rustlers heading for the herd. Posts have limited wire capacity; rustlers cut through over time. Upgrade posts, repair wire, protect the cattle across 5 waves.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First tower-defense structure, first wire/graph edge mechanic, first upgrade system in series

gameQueue.title: Cattle Auction
gameQueue.concept: Economic bidding game: player is the auctioneer at a frontier cattle sale. Six buyers with distinct wealth and desire levels bid in real time. Read buyer patterns, call escalating bids, and drop the hammer at peak price. Buyer desperation, budget limits, and auction momentum all affect the final tally across 8 lots.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First economic/bidding simulation in series, first game where reading multiple simultaneous behavioral patterns drives scoring, deepest social-reading mechanic since Boot Hill Bluff

gameQueue.title: Dust Devil Dance
gameQueue.concept: Generative music sandbox: player draws paths for dust devils across a desert basin. Each dust devil plays a looping melodic phrase; overlapping paths create harmonics; proximity to landmarks modulates timbre and tempo. Goal is to compose a satisfying loop before the storm timer expires.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First generative music composition mechanic in series, first game where the win condition is aesthetic rather than competitive, deepest Web Audio use since Honky Tonk

runLog.summary: Built Game 30: Tumbleweed Pinball - physics pinball engine, cactus bumpers, WANTED poster targets, chain multiplier (1x-8x), drain post deflector, 50 tests pass.
Built Game 31: Pony Express - action-rhythm horse riding, 5 escalating BPM sections, 16th-note beat grid, speed-sync feedback loop, 50 tests pass.
